title: Iain Anderson Traumedy A Guide To Being A Fabulous Homeless Addict
description: Traumedy: A Guide To Being A Fabulous Homeless Addict is a true story about life through addiction to sobriety. From being young and dumb on the Glasgow gay scene, through homelessness on the streets of Barcelona, to being committed to a psych ward and then landing in recovery. It is a tragic yet hilarious true story about overcoming demons and finding the real meaning of what it takes to be happy. Following a smash-hit debut at the Edinburgh Fringe in 2024, Barcelona-based Scottish comedian Iain Anderson has sold out venues across Europe with his unforgettable show. From London and Glasgow to Berlin and Dublin and beyond, audiences have been captivated by a performance that's more than just stand-up—it's a powerful and hilarious rollercoaster of emotions unlike anything else in comedy today. ★★★★★ European Comedy ★★★★ EdFringe Review ★★★★ One4Review Winner of Best Solo Show 2025 at The Clubbie Awards in Barcelona
